title: Famous Paintings & Artists
description: Iconic paintings and the artists who created them

cards.front: Mona Lisa
Leonardo da Vinci's portrait famous for her mysterious smile
The Last Supper
Leonardo da Vinci's mural depicting Jesus and the twelve apostles at their final meal
The Starry Night
Vincent van Gogh's painting of a swirling night sky over a village
Sunflowers (series)
Vincent van Gogh's still-life series of yellow flowers in a vase
The Scream
Edvard Munch's painting of an agonized figure on a bridge under an orange sky
Guernica
Pablo Picasso's large anti-war mural painted in response to the bombing of a Spanish town
Girl with a Pearl Earring
Johannes Vermeer's portrait of a girl in a blue and gold turban, sometimes called the 'Mona Lisa of the North'
The Persistence of Memory
Salvador Dalí's painting featuring melting clocks in a dreamlike landscape
The Night Watch
cards.back: Rembrandt van Rijn (1642; Dutch Golden Age)

cards.front: Rembrandt's large group portrait of a militia company emerging from shadow into light
Water Lilies (series)
Claude Monet's series of about 250 paintings of his flower garden at Giverny
The Birth of Venus
Sandro Botticelli's painting of a goddess emerging from the sea on a shell
The Creation of Adam
Michelangelo's fresco on the Sistine Chapel ceiling showing God reaching out to touch Adam's finger
American Gothic
Grant Wood's painting of a stern farmer holding a pitchfork beside a woman in front of a house with a Gothic window
Whistler's Mother (Arrangement in Grey and Black No. 1)
James McNeill Whistler's painting of an elderly woman seated in profile against a gray wall
A Sunday Afternoon on the Island of La Grande Jatte
Georges Seurat's large painting of Parisians relaxing by the Seine, composed entirely of tiny dots of color
cards.back: A Sunday Afternoon on the Island of La Grande Jatte

cards.front: The Kiss
Gustav Klimt's gold-leaf painting of a couple embracing
Las Meninas
Diego Velázquez's painting of the young Spanish princess Margarita surrounded by attendants, with the artist painting himself in the scene
The School of Athens
Raphael's fresco depicting ancient Greek philosophers gathered in a grand hall, with Plato and Aristotle at center
Liberty Leading the People
Eugène Delacroix's painting of a woman holding the French tricolor flag atop a barricade during the July Revolution
Nighthawks
Edward Hopper's painting of four people in a brightly lit downtown diner late at night
Christina's World
Andrew Wyeth's painting of a woman lying in a grassy field, reaching toward a farmhouse on the horizon
The Great Wave off Kanagawa
Katsushika Hokusai's woodblock print of a towering wave about to crash, with Mount Fuji in the background
Campbell's Soup Cans
Andy Warhol's series of 32 canvases each depicting a different flavor of canned soup
Washington Crossing the Delaware
Emanuel Leutze's painting of a general standing in a boat crossing an icy river on Christmas night, 1776
The Two Fridas
Frida Kahlo's double self-portrait showing two versions of herself with exposed hearts connected by a vein
